Name: Zoning, 198-208 Richmond Terrace, Staten Island (N 260170 ZRR).
Title: Application number N 260170 ZRR (198-208 Richmond Terrace) submitted by Economic Development Opportunity Zone Fund 1 LLC, pursuant to Section 201 of the New York City Charter, for an amendment of the Zoning Resolution of the City of New York, amending the Appendix to Article XII, Chapter 8 (Special St. George District) and APPENDIX F for the purpose of establishing a Mandatory Inclusionary Housing Area, Borough of Staten Island, Community District 1, Council District 49.

History.Description: This Land Use Application was Introduced by Council
